Metadata.title: Chademy — Earn with AI
Metadata.description: Hands-on AI training built for Latvian learners—in English navigation. Learn to build AI services and sell them to businesses.
Metadata.keywords: AI, artificial intelligence, courses, monetization, Latvia, Chademy, automation, chatbot

Hero.h1Line1: Learn to build AI services and
Hero.sub: Practical learning—step by step from your first skill to your first paying client.

FastWin.lead: Five clear steps. Each step trains one concrete skill so you’re ready for real SMB work.

steps.title: Pick a lane
steps.desc: Content, websites, or voice agents — start where you’re strongest.

steps.title: Build skill
steps.desc: Practice lessons, recordings, templates, and bilingual support.

steps.title: Ship a demo
steps.desc: A credible sample you can show on a discovery call.

steps.title: Reach out
steps.desc: Ready outreach templates for DMs and email.

steps.title: Close the sale
steps.desc: Your first euro from an AI-delivered outcome.

Services.lead: Each track focuses on demand-driven services buyers already pay for in Latvia and across Europe.

tracks.title: Social media ops
tracks.desc: Grow general social skills and produce AI video, visuals, and ad-ready content for businesses.

tracks.title: Sites & chatbots
tracks.desc: Ship AI-assisted landing pages and add 24/7 chatbots plus lightweight automation workflows.

tracks.title: Voice & WhatsApp AI
tracks.desc: Automate calls and chats with higher-ticket workflows for demanding teams.

AILaunchpad.kicker: Example monthly upside with ~2–4 active clients
AILaunchpad.footer: Results aren’t guaranteed. Outcomes depend on execution and outbound effort.

cards.label: WhatsApp automation
cards.desc: Instant replies plus lightweight CRM sync

Testimonials.lead: From finishing lessons to shipping client work—in their own words.

quotes.text: "Three weeks later I pitched a Riga restaurant. The install landed clean—now juggling four retainers beside my day job."
quotes.name: Martins K.

quotes.text: "Exactly the pragmatic AI-video stack I wanted. Zero fluff—I now run feeds for three local brands and finally own my calendar."
quotes.name: Laura B.

quotes.text: "Post-course I shipped a dentistry voice agent stack. Automated reminders blew their mind—in a good way."
quotes.name: Raivis D.

Pricing.label: Stacks
